value_metric: the reversible Board-3 A0 switch is live: a feature flag + eligibility gate demote media to discovery and make A0 official original text the default evidence; a non-destructive canary endpoint proves official evidence rate 100% against 8 real gov.cn originals; the flag ships OFF so production Board 3 and the six themes are unchanged, and rollback is one deploy

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: feature flag + gate + canary endpoint; the /api/a0-canary endpoint makes 1 live gov.cn subrequest per call (manual, not cron), well within the DIR-007 free-tier Worker subrequest budget; flag OFF means the cron path is unchanged (0 new subrequests)
